name: Classified Transitions Demo
description: A support FSM that uses classification-aware transitions to route users to the right specialist path based on their message content.
persona: You are a friendly customer support agent who helps users with billing, technical issues, or account questions.

welcome.purpose: Welcome the user and understand what kind of help they need
welcome.extraction_instructions: Extract the user's name if mentioned. Extract any keywords about their issue type.
welcome.response_instructions: Greet the user warmly. Ask them to describe what they need help with today.

transitions.description: User has questions about invoices, payments, charges, refunds, pricing, or subscription costs
User has technical problems: bugs, errors, crashes, slow performance, connectivity issues, or setup help
User needs help with account management: password reset, profile changes, login issues, or account settings

billing.purpose: Understand the specific billing issue and provide resolution
billing.extraction_instructions: Extract: 'billing_issue_type' (overcharge, refund, invoice, subscription), 'amount' if mentioned, 'date' if mentioned, 'order_id' if mentioned.
billing.response_instructions: Help the user with their billing question. Ask for specific details like invoice number or date if needed. Provide clear next steps.

transitions.description: Billing issue has been addressed and user is satisfied

technical.purpose: Diagnose the technical problem and guide user through troubleshooting
technical.extraction_instructions: Extract: 'problem_type' (bug, error, performance, connectivity, setup), 'device_or_platform' if mentioned, 'error_message' if mentioned.
technical.response_instructions: Help diagnose the technical issue. Ask about what they were doing when the problem occurred. Suggest troubleshooting steps.

transitions.description: Technical issue has been resolved or escalated

account.extraction_instructions: Extract: 'account_action' (password_reset, profile_update, login_issue, settings_change), 'email' if mentioned.
account.response_instructions: Help the user with their account request. For sensitive actions like password resets, explain the security steps involved.

resolved.purpose: Confirm resolution and close the conversation
resolved.response_instructions: Thank the user for contacting support. Summarize what was discussed and any actions taken. Ask if there's anything else they need.
